lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: Hello there [laddie/lass].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: They say it's some kind of powerful fire spirit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you mean ice?

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: Aye that as well.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: What it is doesn't bother me, just as long as we keep it behind the Doors.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Doors of Dinh.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: The Doors were built by Dinh to contain the Wintertodt. This was over a thousand years ago and they still stand today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who was Dinh?

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: Dinh was the greatest smith that the world has ever seen. I am the finest smith around today and even I cannot match his abilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: The name's Undor. You'll struggle to find a dwarf in this land who knows more about metalwork than me.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: One day I hope to be as good as the legendary Dinh himself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: They say the doors are failing and the Wintertodt is trying to escape. I'm here to prove to them that the Doors are fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And are they?

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: Of course they are! They were made by Dinh himself.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: I'm just here to keep an eye on things. Even though the Doors are fixed now, it will take many years for things to get back to normal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Undor
lines.text: Until next time [laddie/lass].
